task.summary: implement test ajax request on client
implement WebAudio API with start/stop function
implement start/stop record on voice recognition
add control functions to typing text in inputfields
search function optimized for long element names
implement search for placeholder, search optimized
implement search only for elements visible in viewport
fix issue with tabs selecting, more selectors for inputs added
fix issue with multiple selected elements
implement simple ui that shows system states
reoginize code, add element hilighting bei multiple selected elements
implement perfect overlay for multiple select

Merge branch 'navs'

fix issue with not clickable links
semantic ui framwork added for testing
add .vocs_clickable for customizing clickable elements, some bug fixes
test functions for fuzzy search implemented
implemented function, that recognize with fuzzy search, if keyword was used
test fuzzy search, implement executing events without keywords
